prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) stands at a whiteboard in a bright conference room, sketching out a campaign targeting plan. Floating around the whiteboard are semi-transparent holographic data icons: audience silhouettes, location pins, shopping cart icons, and a profile exclusion icon. Sam gestures at the whiteboard with a marker, expression focused and planning. His tablet sits on the conference table. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam stands at a whiteboard sketching a targeting plan, surrounded by floating holographic data icons — audiences, locations, purchase behavior

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) types a search on his laptop in the agency lounge. From the laptop screen, three teal data streams flow outward toward three distinct icons in the distance — a location pin, a shopping cart, and audience silhouettes — representing three different data providers. The streams carry small glowing data particles. Sam looks purposeful, one search reaching multiple sources simultaneously. Warm natural light, relaxed but productive setting. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam types a search on his laptop as three data streams flow outward to location, retail, and audience data provider icons — one query, three sources

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, rolled sleeves, silver watch) reviews signal results on a large wall-mounted screen, arms crossed, evaluating. Three groups of data cards are displayed side by side — each group has a different colored accent (blue, green, orange) and shows abstract data visualizations: a map radius, shopping basket patterns, and audience clusters. Sam leans toward the screen, studying the comparison. A colleague's desk is visible in the background. Clean, organized data presentation. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam reviews signal results on a wall screen, arms crossed — three groups of data cards with different colored accents showing location, retail, and audience data

prompt: Split scene. Bottom half: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, rolled sleeves, silver watch) taps his tablet to activate signal segments — teal data streams flow upward from his tablet toward two platform icons (a TV shape and a display rectangle) that glow as segments arrive. Top half: Kai (white man, early 30s, sandy blond hair pushed back, no glasses, wearing a henley shirt under a light puffer vest) watches the activation metrics on his laptop in a startup office with exposed brick and a standing desk. Both are connected by the flowing data streams. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Split scene — Sam activates signal segments from his tablet below, data streams flow up to platforms, while Kai monitors activation metrics on his laptop in a startup office above

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, rolled sleeves, silver watch) views a targeting visualization on a large screen, one hand in pocket, looking satisfied. The screen shows three transparent data layers stacking together: a geographic map with highlighted zones on the bottom, audience segment clusters in the middle, and purchase behavior indicators on top. Where all three layers overlap, the intersection glows bright teal. The layered effect feels like looking through colored glass — each source adding precision. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam views three targeting layers stacking on a large screen — location, audience, and purchase data overlap and glow where they intersect

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, rolled sleeves, silver watch) and Kai (white man, early 30s, sandy blond hair pushed back, no glasses, henley under puffer vest) stand together in front of a large display showing a marketplace visualization. The display shows flowing data streams connecting a row of small diverse office buildings at the top (data providers) through a central hub to platform shapes at the bottom (buyers and DSPs). Sam points at the display explaining something, Kai nods with his arms crossed. They're collaborating across the buy-side and data-provider divide. Bright, open conference space. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam and Kai stand together in front of a large display showing the signals marketplace — data providers at top flowing through a hub to buyers below, collaborating across the ecosystem
